pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh explicitly require adding a wall to a new IFC project and saving the file.
Task description and setup_task.sh explicitly require adding a wall to a new IFC project and saving the file.
Adding a wall element to an IFC model in a BIM authoring tool aligns directly with architectural modeling.
BIM software and IFC models are fundamentally used in the AEC industry.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated empty IFC project within BlenderBIM. The requirement is to create a new wall element on the ground floor storey and save the model to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/wall_test.ifc'. Local verification is handled via a stub, as true verification requires external VLM evaluation of the resulting IFC model or visual workspace.
